cross_language_mismatches.issue: Hebrew has 156 questions, English has 151. Arrays misaligned from ~Q83 onward.

findings.question: N/A (file-level: He=156, En=151 question count mismatch)
findings.problem: Hebrew has 156 daily questions but English has only 151. From ~Q83 onward, same-index questions test different concepts. 5 Hebrew questions have no English equivalent.
findings.suggested_fix: Identify 5 extra Hebrew questions around index 83-90 and add English translations or remove them.

findings.question: storage/hard English questions (7 of 8 answers at index 1)
findings.problem: 87.5% of storage/hard English answers are index 1. A test-taker can guess index 1 every time for 87.5% accuracy.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order for several storage/hard English questions.

findings.question: config/easy En (75% index 3) and config/hard En (75% index 1)
findings.problem: config/easy En: 6 of 8 at index 3. config/hard En: 6 of 8 at index 1. Both severely imbalanced.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several questions from each group.

findings.question: troubleshooting/easy Hebrew (6 of 8 at index 0)
findings.problem: 75% of troubleshooting/easy Hebrew answers are at index 0.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several questions.

findings.question: networking/easy Hebrew (5 of 8 at index 2)
findings.problem: 62.5% of networking/easy Hebrew answers are at index 2.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several questions.

findings.question: storage/easy He (62.5% idx 2), storage/medium He (62.5% idx 2)
findings.problem: Both storage easy and medium Hebrew are heavily biased toward index 2.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several questions.

findings.question: workloads/medium He (50% idx 0), En (62.5% idx 1)
findings.problem: Both languages have 0% at index 3 and one dominant index.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several questions.

findings.question: argo/medium He and En (50% idx 0, 0% idx 3)
findings.problem: ArgoCD medium never uses index 3 in either language, 50% on index 0.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several questions.

findings.question: linux/medium Q4: production server writes logs to a 2GB file
findings.problem: Correct answer is 2.29x longer than average distractor and 35 chars longer than 2nd longest. Guessable by length.
findings.suggested_fix: Shorten correct answer or pad distractors with specific but incorrect command snippets.

findings.question: networking/hard En Q7: A Pod cannot reach the internet
findings.problem: Correct option is 1.71x longer and 27 chars longer than 2nd longest. Guessable by length.
findings.suggested_fix: Shorten correct option or pad distractors with specific ipBlock/CIDR details.

findings.question: troubleshooting/hard He Q0: After Deployment, new Pods Cra
findings.problem: Correct answer is 1.71x longer than average distractor.
findings.suggested_fix: Pad distractors with kubectl command details or shorten correct answer.

findings.question: networkpolicy-block Step 3 He: Label Mismatch Confirmed
findings.problem: Correct Hebrew option is 38 chars longer than 2nd longest. Guessable by length.
findings.suggested_fix: Shorten correct option or add detailed kubectl patch commands to distractors.

findings.question: All incidents combined: [19,15,1,1] across 36 steps
findings.problem: 94.4% of incident answers are index 0 or 1. Indices 2 and 3 used only 5.6%.
findings.suggested_fix: Shuffle option order in several incident steps to use all four indices.

findings.question: troubleshooting/medium Q0: Pod crashes and restarts
findings.problem: CrashLoopBackOff is 1.5x longer but absolute gap is only 4 chars.
findings.suggested_fix: No fix needed -- flag for manual review.

findings.question: config/medium He Q2: What is a ServiceAccount
findings.problem: Correct option is 1.41x the average but gap is only 11 chars. Marginal.
findings.suggested_fix: No fix needed -- flag for manual review.

findings.question: linux/easy Q2: Which command shows service logs
findings.problem: Correct answer is 1.5x average but is not the longest option.
findings.suggested_fix: No fix needed -- flag for manual review.

findings.question: argo/easy He Q4: Team wants to rollback
findings.problem: Correct is 1.53x average but not longest overall.
findings.suggested_fix: No fix needed -- flag for manual review.

findings.question: Multiple He questions (Q19, Q24, Q32, Q56, Q57, Q72, etc.)
findings.problem: ~20 Hebrew and ~15 English daily questions have correct answers 1.4x-1.6x distractor average. Most gaps under 20 chars.
findings.suggested_fix: No fix needed -- flag for manual review per question.
